snippets.comment: some of you are so weird her accent is fine?? shes not that hard honestly if you just pay attention really well since not understanding one lesson can mess you up. other than that though shes pretty nice and not bad, you do have to print a lot though and there's a bunch of extra credit which is nice

She has an accent so at times difficult to understand. I've never been good at math but she made (statistics) easier to understand. She's funny and cracks jokes. You can tell she wants her students to succeed. Would take again but be aware lots of students dropped her class (started with 26 dropped

Took this class for credit I would not recommend taking her, she's really hard to understand, and you have to take notes to understand the lectures, she was also rude to some of us, she wouldn't give clear explanation, always late 5-10 minutes. Attendance is mandatory and must show up to class don't
